languages.text: {n}Маражай задумчиво хмыкает.{/n} "Кажется, я слышал это имя — давно, мимолетом. А значит, этот огир... крайне выдающийся среди своих, раз его поминают даже в Темном городе".

{n}Marazhai makes a pensive sound.{/n} "I believe I have heard the name — long ago, in passing. Which means that this Oghyr is... most very prominent among his own kind, to be known even in the Dark City."
languages.original_text: {n}Маражай задумчиво хмыкает.{/n} "Кажется, я слышал это имя — давно, мимолетом. А значит, этот огир... крайне выдающийся среди своих, раз его поминают даже в Темном городе".

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai makes a pensive sound.{/n} "I believe I have heard the name — long ago, in passing. Which means that this Oghyr is... most very prominent among his own kind, to be known even in the Dark City."

{n}Marazhai makes a pensive sound.{/n} "I believe I have heard the name — long ago, in passing. Which means that this Oghyr is... most very prominent among his own kind, to be known even in the Dark City."

languages.text: {n}マラズハイは考え込むように呟く。{/n}「このオグイヤーは、闇の都市でさえ知られるほど、自分の種の中でも非常に重要な存在なのだろう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai makes a pensive sound.{/n} "I believe I have heard the name — long ago, in passing. Which means that this Oghyr is... most very prominent among his own kind, to be known even in the Dark City."

traits.locale_text: マラーザイは考え込むように呟く。「このオグイヤーは、闇の都市でさえ知られるほど、自分の種の中でも非常に重要な存在なのだろう。」

languages.text: {n}玛拉斋发出一声沉吟。{/n}“我似乎听过这个名字——很久以前，偶有耳闻。这意味着这个遗落者……在其同族中极其显赫，才能让他的名声传到黑暗之城。”
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai makes a pensive sound.{/n} "I believe I have heard the name — long ago, in passing. Which means that this Oghyr is... most very prominent among his own kind, to be known even in the Dark City."

traits.locale_text: {n}玛拉斋发出一声沉吟。{/n}“我似乎听过这个名字——很久以前，偶有耳闻。这意味着这个遗落者……在其同族中极其显赫，才能让他的名声传到黑暗之城。”

languages.text: {n}Marazhai emite un sonido pensativo.{/n} «Creo que he oído ese nombre... hace mucho, de pasada. Eso significa que este Oghyr es... extremadamente notorio entre los suyos, para que lo conozcan hasta en la Ciudad Siniestra».
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai makes a pensive sound.{/n} "I believe I have heard the name — long ago, in passing. Which means that this Oghyr is... most very prominent among his own kind, to be known even in the Dark City."

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai emite un sonido pensativo.{/n} «Creo que he oído ese nombre... hace mucho, de pasada. Eso significa que este Oghyr es... extremadamente notorio entre los suyos, para que lo conozcan hasta en la Ciudad Siniestra».

languages.text: {n}Marazhai macht ein nachdenkliches Geräusch.{/n} "Ich glaube, ich habe den Namen gehört ... vor langer Zeit, beiläufig. Das heißt, dieser Oghyr ist ... ausgesprochen prominent unter seinesgleichen, dass er selbst in der Dunklen Stadt bekannt ist."
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai makes a pensive sound.{/n} "I believe I have heard the name — long ago, in passing. Which means that this Oghyr is... most very prominent among his own kind, to be known even in the Dark City."

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai macht ein nachdenkliches Geräusch.{/n} "Ich glaube, ich habe den Namen gehört ... vor langer Zeit, beiläufig. Das heißt, dieser Oghyr ist ... ausgesprochen prominent unter seinesgleichen, dass er selbst in der Dunklen Stadt bekannt ist."

languages.text: {n}Marazhai pousse un soupir songeur.{/n} « Il me semble avoir déjà entendu ce nom incidemment, il y a bien longtemps. Si cet Oghyr est connu jusque dans la Cité Crépusculaire, cela signifie certainement qu'il occupe une place très importante parmi les siens. »
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai makes a pensive sound.{/n} "I believe I have heard the name — long ago, in passing. Which means that this Oghyr is... most very prominent among his own kind, to be known even in the Dark City."

traits.locale_text: {n}Marazhai pousse un soupir songeur.{/n} « Il me semble avoir déjà entendu ce nom incidemment, il y a bien longtemps. Si cet Oghyr est connu jusque dans la Cité Crépusculaire, cela signifie certainement qu'il occupe une place très importante parmi les siens. »

languages.text: {n}Marazhai, düşünceli bir ses çıkarıyor.{/n} "Sanırım bu ismi duymuştum. Çok uzun zaman önce, geçerken. Bu da demek oluyor ki bu Oghyr... Kara Şehir'de bile tanınacak kadar önde gelen bir kimse."
languages.original_text: {n}Marazhai makes a pensive sound.{/n} "I believe I have heard the name — long ago, in passing. Which means that this Oghyr is... most very prominent among his own kind, to be known even in the Dark City."
